description: The `DeveloperMode` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows Developer Mode.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `DeveloperMode` DSC resource is used to enable or disable Windows Developer Mode.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether Developer Mode should be enabled (`Present`) or disabled (`Absent`).
        Defaults to `Present`.

IsEnabled.title: IsEnabled
IsEnabled.description:
A read-only property indicating whether Developer Mode is currently enabled.
        This property is not configurable.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/DeveloperMode
